contract_claim: Returning integer 1 from a Click command (lines 108, 122, 126, 132, 136, 149, 168, 191, 199) does not cause a non-zero process exit when invoked via the Click CLI. Click ignores non-SystemExit return values from command functions. Only the `sys.exit(main())` at line 202 (direct execution) would propagate this. Callers using `debug-mcp-server` as a CLI tool will see exit code 0 on error paths.
observed_behavior: Returning integer 1 from a Click command (lines 108, 122, 126, 132, 136, 149, 168, 191, 199) does not cause a non-zero process exit when invoked via the Click CLI. Click ignores non-SystemExit return values from command functions. Only the `sys.exit(main())` at line 202 (direct execution) would propagate this. Callers using `debug-mcp-server` as a CLI tool will see exit code 0 on error paths.
